case_title: DAVID ALAN RUBEN MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, A DEPARTMENT WITHIN
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO THE ANSWER FILED BY THE RESPONDENT FILED BY PETITIONER RUBEN MD, DAVID ALAN
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-23-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE (A131590 DIV 2)
FILING FEES OF $410 PAID BY PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID RUBEN'S RE-NOTICED MOTION FOR ORDER AND ISSUANCE OF PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. ARIZONA'S IMPOSITION OF DISCIPLINE WAS FOR AN ACT SUBSTANTIALLY RELATED TO THE PRACTICE OF MEDICINE SO THE NEXUS REQUIREMENTS IN SECTION 141 AND THE CONSTITUTION ARE SATISFIED. IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED SIGNIFICANT DIFFERENCES BETWEEN ARIZONA AND CALIFORNIA LAW. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840
